result.stdout:
uSync CommandLine: 16.1.0

Description:

Usage:
  uSync [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  test                     Test command
  user-current             Fetch the user executing the commands
  user-list                List all users
  cache-rebuild            Rebuild the cache on the server
  cache-reload             Reload the cache on the server
  models-rebuild           Rebuild the models on the server
  models-status            Get the status of the models on the server
  indexer-rebuild          Rebuild the index on the server
  indexer-list             List the indexes on the server
  healthcheck-list         List the health checks on the server
  healthcheck-group-list   List the health check groups on the server
  healthcheck-group-check  Run a health check on the server
  usync-settings           List all settings
  usync-import             Import all items
  usync-export             Export all items
  usync-ping               Ping the uSync server

result.stdout:
uSync CommandLine: 16.1.0

Description:
  Rebuild the cache on the server

Usage:
  uSync cache-rebuild [options]

Options:
  -s, --server-url <server-url>  The URL of the uSync server
  -k, --secret <secret>          The secret key for the uSync server
  -i, --client-id <client-id>    The client ID for the uSync server
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
uSync CommandLine: 16.1.0

Description:
  Export all items

Usage:
  uSync usync-export [options]

Options:
  -t, --set <set>                handler set to use (default : default)
  -g, --group <group>            handler group to use (default : all)
  -s, --server-url <server-url>  The URL of the uSync server
  -k, --secret <secret>          The secret key for the uSync server
  -i, --client-id <client-id>    The client ID for the uSync server
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

uSync CommandLine: 16.1.0

Description:
  Import all items

Usage:
  uSync usync-import [options]

Options:
  -f, --force                    force the import
  -t, --set <set>                handler set to use (default : default)
  -g, --group <group>            handler group to use (default : all)
  -s, --server-url <server-url>  The URL of the uSync server
  -k, --secret <secret>          The secret key for the uSync server
  -i, --client-id <client-id>    The client ID for the uSync server
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
uSync CommandLine: 16.1.0

Description:
  Ping the uSync server

Usage:
  uSync usync-ping [options]

Options:
  -r, --retrys <retrys>          Number of times to retry the ping (default is 10)
  -s, --server-url <server-url>  The URL of the uSync server
  -k, --secret <secret>          The secret key for the uSync server
  -i, --client-id <client-id>    The client ID for the uSync server
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
